specifications.material: ABS Frame + Optical Lenses + Smartphone Holder
features: Compatible with iOS and Android smartphones
Educational AR content (solar system, dinosaurs, geography)

sellingPoints: Affordable entry point to AR technology
Transforms any smartphone into AR device
Educational content makes screen time meaningful
Lightweight and comfortable for extended wear

aiGeneratedContent.shortDescriptionEn: Explore new worlds with AR Explorer! These lightweight AR glasses turn any smartphone into a magical augmented reality device. Includes 3 exciting games plus educational content that makes learning an adventure.
aiGeneratedContent.shortDescriptionZh: 用AR探索者探索新世界！这款轻便的AR眼镜可以将任何智能手机变成神奇的增强现实设备。包含3款精彩游戏加上让学习成为冒险的教育内容。

marketingCopy.headlineEn: See the World Differently – AR Adventure Glasses
marketingCopy.headlineZh: 以不同方式看世界——AR探险眼镜
marketingCopy.bodyEn: AR Explorer democratizes augmented reality for children. By leveraging the processing power of smartphones parents already own, we deliver immersive AR experiences at a fraction of dedicated headset costs. The included games blend entertainment with education – exploring the solar system, excavating virtual dinosaurs, or navigating world geography – making screen time both fun and enriching.
marketingCopy.bodyZh: AR探索者为儿童普及了增强现实技术。通过利用家长已经拥有的智能手机的处理能力，我们以专用头显成本的一小部分提供沉浸式AR体验。内置的游戏将娱乐与教育融合在一起——探索太阳系、挖掘虚拟恐龙或导航世界地理——让屏幕时间既有趣又丰富。
